title: Connect and Operate MCP in Codex and Claude · Mastery Check
summary: Configure one safe server in both Codex and Claude Code. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for cross-client MCP configuration and smoke tests. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Configure scoped Codex STDIO or HTTP servers, timeouts, tools, approvals, and authentication.
Configure Claude Code local, project, or user MCP scope and review shared server trust.
Verify initialization, primitive discovery, tool calls, errors, and shutdown in each client.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process
steps.instruction: Order the Codex Config evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Codex Config assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.
